englishDefinitions: The website address for WGBH accessibility or media access services.
A web domain name referring to an online WGBH access resource.
examples: For more information about captions, visit access.wgbh.org.
The video description directed users to access.wgbh.org for accessibility resources.
Teachers were told to check access.wgbh.org for support materials.
